creator: rometravelers
caption:
When Rome glows in gold, every street feels like a masterpiece by @iampcast ✨🧡 Tag someone you'd love to visit Rome with! 🤩

💡 Rome’s rooftops and monuments catch the sun differently every evening, creating unique warm glows that photographers and travelers love

transcription.text: Baby, baby, baby, I'm coming home to your tender seat. Oh, then you're my one and only woman. You're worthy to be the taste in my mouth. Girl, you're the only one that I want. Want to be around.
